name: Hexblood
summary: Where wishing fails, ancient magic can offer a heart’s desire—at least, for a time. Hexbloods are individuals infused with eldritch magic, fey energy, or mysterious witchcraft. Some who enter into bargains with hags gain their deepest wishes but eventually find themselves transformed. These changes evidence a hag’s influence: ears that split in forked points, skin in lurid shades, long hair that regrows if cut, and an irremovable living crown. Along with these marks, hexbloods manifest hag-like traits, such as darkvision, and a variety of magical methods to beguile the senses and avoid the same.

stats.label: Ability Score Increase
stats.value: Increase one ability score by 2 and increase a different one by 1, or increase three different ability scores by 1. If you are replacing your race with this lineage, replace any Ability Score Increase you previously had with this.

stats.label: Languages
stats.value: You can speak, read, and write Common and one other language that you and your DM agree is appropriate for the character. If you are replacing your race with this lineage, you retain any languages you had and gain no new languages.

stats.label: Size
stats.value: You are Medium or Small. You choose the size when you gain this lineage.

stats.label: Ability Score Increase
stats.value: Increase one ability score by 2, and increase a different one by 1.

stats.label: Size
stats.value: Medium or Small (choose when you gain this lineage)

coreTraits.name: 4You were cursed as a child
coreTraits.summary: A deal with the spirits of the forest transformed you into a hexblood, now free of the curse.

coreTraits.name: Ancestral Legacy
coreTraits.summary: If you replace a race with this lineage, you can keep the following elements of that race: any skill proficiencies you gained from it and any climbing, flying, or swimming speed you gained from it. If you don't keep any of those elements or you choose this lineage at character creation, you gain proficiency in two skills of your choice.

coreTraits.name: Darkvision
coreTraits.summary: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light and in darkness as if it were dim light. You discern colors in that darkness as shades of gray.

coreTraits.name: Eerie Token
coreTraits.summary: As a bonus action, you can harmlessly remove a lock of your hair, one of your nails, or one of your teeth. This token is imbued with magic until you finish a long rest. While the token is imbued this way, you can take these actions:

coreTraits.name: Telepathic Message
coreTraits.summary: As an action, you can send a telepathic message to the creature holding or carrying the token, as long as you are within 10 miles of it. The message can contain up to twenty-five words.

coreTraits.name: Remote Viewing
coreTraits.summary: If you are within 10 miles of the token, you can enter a trance as an action. The trance lasts for 1 minute, but it ends early if you dismiss it (no action required) or are incapacitated. During this trance, you can see and hear from the token as if you were located where it is. While you are using your senses at the token's location, you are blinded and deafened in regard to your own surroundings. When the trance ends, the token is harmlessly destroyed.

coreTraits.name: Hex Magic
coreTraits.summary: You can cast theDisguise SelfandHexspells with this trait. Once you cast either of these spells with this trait, you can’t cast that spell with it again until you finish a long rest. You can also cast these spells using any spell slots you have. Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for these spells (choose the ability when you gain this lineage).

coreTraits.name: 4You were cursed as a child
coreTraits.summary: A deal with the spirits of the forest transformed you into a hexblood, now free of the curse.

coreTraits.name: 8You are a child of the wilds
coreTraits.summary: Animals and mysterious whispers were the only family you ever knew.

coreTraits.name: Darkvision
coreTraits.summary: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light and in darkness as if it were dim light.
